title: Candidate Interview Evaluation Tools: 2026 Platform Comparison
description: Comprehensive review of 2026 Candidate Interview Evaluation Tools, including features, pricing, and platform comparisons. Helping staffing agencies evaluate candidate interviews.
content:
Candidate Interview Evaluation Overview

Interview evaluation is an important component of staffing agency candidate assessment. Staffing agencies need to evaluate candidate interviews including interview scoring, performance assessment, feedback collection. Candidate interview evaluation tools help agencies achieve interview scoring, performance assessment, evaluation management.

The core value of interview evaluation tools lies in improving evaluation efficiency by 60%, enhancing scoring accuracy by 70%, optimizing assessment management by 50%. According to industry research, staffing agencies adopting interview evaluation tools average evaluation time shortened by 40%, scoring accuracy improved by 35%, assessment management efficiency improved by 30%.

Interview Evaluation Platform Reviews

HireVue Interview Evaluation

HireVue provides AI-driven interview evaluation services. Interview scoring features score candidate interviews. Performance assessment features assess interview performance. Evaluation management features manage evaluation processes.

Pricing per month 500-2000 USD. Customer feedback notes AI evaluation advanced, interview scoring excellent.

Spark Hire Interview Evaluation

Spark Hire provides video interview evaluation platform. Interview scoring features score candidate interviews. Performance assessment features assess interview performance. Evaluation management features manage evaluation processes.

Pricing per month 50-150 USD. Customer feedback notes video evaluation comprehensive, interview scoring professional.

Selection Recommendations

Staffing agencies selecting candidate interview evaluation tools should focus on: interview scoring scores candidate interviews; performance assessment assesses interview performance; evaluation management manages evaluation processes; cost structure matches agency evaluation volume.
author: Interview Evaluation Research Institute
